controls.control_objective: To ensure in its own interest and as a customer education effort in the interest of the public, consider designing suitable posters or pamphlets or flyers or no
controls.control_description:

of the public, consider designing suitable posters or pamphlets or flyers or notices
containing following messages:
• Never respond to unsolicited offers of money received through
emails/phone/other media*
• No one really gives you money for free*
• Be careful while investing in seemingly attractive schemes offering high
returns*
• Don't invest in unregulated companies/entities*
• Don't rely on hearsay - Check for yourself*
• High return means higher risk including potential loss of entire money - Check
your risk-appetite!*
• Take care of your money - it is hard to earn but easy to lose*
• When in doubt check with a trusted financial adviser*
*For any clarification, visit www.rbi.org.in or www.sebi.gov.in or www.irdai.gov.in

restraining the claimant(s) from receiving nor the LAB from making the payment.

from making the payment, the claim shall not be entertained during the period the
order is in force.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered based on subsequent court order to that effect

The settlement of claim shall be considered based on subsequent

No bond of surety shall be insisted from a third party in cases falling under

remark 'Account holder deceased' and intimate the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal
heir(s).

controls.control_description:
An LAB shall incorporate a clause in the account opening form itself to the
effect that in the event of death of the depositor, premature termination of term
deposits would be allowed without any penal charge, even if the deposit is within the
lock-in-period.

controls.control_objective: To ensure require the consent of the surviving depositors and the legal heir(s) of the deceased joint holder, in case of death of one of the depositors
controls.control_description:

survivorship clause, shall require the consent of the surviving depositors and the

furnished by all the depositors jointly to the LAB, either at the time of placing the term

withdrawal option shall be allowed to the survivors on the death of any of the
depositors, without seeking the concurrence of the legal heir(s) of the deceased joint

controls.control_description:
The nominee(s) / legal heir(s) of a missing person shall be required to get an
order from the competent court under the provisions of Sections 110 or 111 of the
Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam, 2023.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to get an order from the competent court under the provisions of sections 110 or 111 of the bharatiya sakshya adhiniyam, 2023

controls.control_objective: To ensure be settled as per the procedure applicable for settlement of claims in respect of a deceased customer
controls.control_description:
The claim in respect of such missing person

a deceased customer.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained in lieu of the death certificate
controls.control_description:
In such cases, a copy of the court order declaring the civil
death of the account holder shall be obtained in lieu of the death certificate.

controls.control_description:
However, to avoid inconvenience and undue hardship to the common person where
the aggregate amount payable, including accrued interest, as on the date of the
application is less than ₹1 lakh or such higher amount as may be fixed by the LAB, a
copy of the First Information Report (FIR) and non-traceable report issued by police
authorities shall be obtained in lieu of death certificate or an order from a competent
court declaring the civil death of the account holder for settling the claim.

controls.control_objective: To ensure give access of the locker to such nominee(s) with liberty to remove the contents of the locker
controls.control_description:

controls.control_description:
In case the locker was hired jointly with the instructions to operate it under joint
signatures, and the locker hirers nominate any other individual(s), in the event of
death of any of the locker hirers, an LAB shall give access of the locker and the
liberty to remove the contents jointly to the nominee(s) and the survivor(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give access of the locker and the liberty to remove the contents jointly to the nominee(s) and the survivor(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the mandate in the event of death of one or more of the joint locker hirers
controls.control_description:

instructed that the access of the locker should be given to "either or survivor",
"anyone or survivor" or "former or survivor" or according to any other survivorship
<image>
clause permissible under the provisions of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, an LAB
shall follow the mandate in the event of death of one or more of the joint locker
hirers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow the mandate in the event of death of one or more of the joint locker hirers

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that, the contents of locker

the guardian have not been provided in the nomination form, the LAB shall hand

contents of safe deposit locker on behalf of such minor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hand over the contents of the locker to a person who is, in law, competent to receive the contents of safe deposit locker on behalf of such minor

survivor(s) and deceased status of the locker hirer(s) by obtaining appropriate

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , however, ensure the following before giving access to the contents to the nominee(s) / survivor(s): (1) exercise due care and caution in establishin

controls.control_description:

hardship to the legal heir(s) / claimant(s), the LAB shall adopt a simplified procedure
for settlement of claims in safe deposit lockers provided there is no dispute amongst
the legal heir(s) / claimant(s) and
(1) the deceased locker hirer(s) had not made any nomination, or
(2) the joint hirers had not given any mandate that the access may be given to
one or more of the survivors by a clear survivorship clause, or
(3) there is no 'Will' left behind by the deceased locker hirer.

The LAB may recover shortfall, if any,
as per terms of the loan agreement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to recover shortfall

controls.control_objective: To ensure be borne by the lab
controls.control_description:
In case of any damage to the pledged eligible collateral by an LAB during the
tenor of loan, the cost of repair shall be borne by the LAB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be borne by the lab

controls.control_objective: To ensure suitably compensate the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)
controls.control_description:
In case of loss of the pledged eligible collateral and / or any loss emanating
from deterioration or discrepancy in quantity or purity observed during internal audit
or otherwise including at the time of return or auction of collateral, an LAB shall
suitably compensate the borrower(s) / legal heir(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to suitably compensate the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure compensate the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) at the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay beyond the timeline prescribed at paragraph 196 above
controls.control_description:
In case of delay in release of the pledged collateral after full repayment or
settlement of loan by the borrower, where reasons for delay are attributable to an
LAB, the LAB shall compensate the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) at the rate of ₹5,000
for each day of delay beyond the timeline prescribed at paragraph 196 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to compensate the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) at the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay beyond the timeline prescribed at paragraph 196 above

controls.control_objective: To ensure communicate reasons for such delay to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)
controls.control_description:
If the
delay is not attributable to the LAB, it shall communicate reasons for such delay to
the borrower(s) / legal heir(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to communicate reasons for such delay to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue periodic reminders to borrower(s) / legal heir(s) through letters, email or sms if the email and mobile number are registered with the lab
controls.control_description:
Further, where the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) has not
approached the LAB for release of pledged eligible collateral after full repayment or
settlement of loan, the LAB shall issue periodic reminders to borrower(s) / legal
heir(s) through letters, email or SMS if the email and mobile number are registered
with the LAB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue periodic reminders to borrower(s) / legal heir(s) through letters, email or sms if the email and mobile number are registered with the lab

controls.control_objective: To ensure be without prejudice to the rights of a borrower to get any other compensation as per any applicable law
controls.control_description:
The compensation provided in these Directions shall be without prejudice to the
rights of a borrower to get any other compensation as per any applicable law.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be without prejudice to the rights of a borrower to get any other compensation as per any applicable law

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as unclaimed
controls.control_description:
The pledged gold and / or silver collateral lying with an LAB beyond two years
from the date of full repayment or settlement of loan shall be treated as unclaimed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as unclaimed

controls.control_objective: To ensure periodically undertake special drives to ascertain the whereabouts of the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) in respect of such unclaimed gold and/ or silver
controls.control_description:
The LAB shall periodically undertake special drives to ascertain the whereabouts of
the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) in respect of such unclaimed gold and/ or silver
collateral.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to periodically undertake special drives to ascertain the whereabouts of the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) in respect of such unclaimed gold and/ or silver

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put up to the customer service committee or the board, as the case may be, at half-yearly intervals for a review
controls.control_description:
A report on unclaimed gold and silver collateral shall be put up to the Customer
Service Committee or the Board, as the case may be, at half-yearly intervals for a
review.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put up to the customer service committee or the board, as the case may be, at half-yearly intervals for a review

controls.control_objective: To ensure refrain from issuance of misleading advertisements containing unrealistic claims to promote loans against gold or silver collateral
controls.control_description:
An LAB shall refrain from issuance of misleading advertisements containing
unrealistic claims to promote loans against gold or silver collateral.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refrain from issuance of misleading advertisements containing unrealistic claims to promote loans against gold or silver collateral

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that all arrangements for sourcing and / or recovery of loans against eligible collateral, are in compliance with applicable instructions on ou
controls.control_description:

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that all arrangements for sourcing and / or recovery of loans against eligible collateral, are in compliance with applicable instructions on ou

contained in the Chapter on 'Lending against Gold and Silver Collateral' in Reserve
Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put in place by an lab with the approval of its board
controls.control_description:
A Fair Practices Code (FPC) based on these directions shall be put in place by
an LAB with the approval of its Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put in place by an lab with the approval of its board

controls.control_objective: To ensure be displayed by the lab in all its offices and on its website
controls.control_description:
The FPC shall be displayed by the LAB in all
its offices and on its website.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be displayed by the lab in all its offices and on its website

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued in a language understood by the borrower
controls.control_description:

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide a loan card to the borrower which shall incorporate the following: (1) information which adequately identifies the borrower

controls.control_description:
Issuance of non-credit products shall be with full consent of the borrowers and
fee structure for such products shall be explicitly communicated to the borrower in

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be with full consent of the borrowers and fee structure for such products shall be explicitly communicated to the borrower in the loan card itself

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no pre-payment charges levied on microfinance loans
controls.control_description: There shall be no pre-payment charges levied on microfinance loans.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no pre-payment charges levied on microfinance loans

controls.control_description:
Charges,
if any, for delayed payment shall be applied on the overdue amount and not on the
entire loan amount.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applied on the overdue amount and not on the entire loan amount

controls.control_description:
An LAB shall prominently display the minimum, maximum and average interest

booklets / pamphlets) issued by it and details on its website.

controls.control_description:
This information shall
also be included in the supervisory returns and subjected to supervisory scrutiny.

controls.control_description:
Any change in interest rate or any other charge shall be informed to the

controls.control_description:
As part of their awareness campaigns, SROs/ other industry associations may

operating in a district.

controls.control_objective: To ensure also sensitise their members against charging of usurious interest rates
controls.control_description:

members against charging of usurious interest rates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also sensitise their members against charging of usurious interest rates

controls.control_objective: To ensure also make available information regarding interest charged by labs on microfinance loans
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank shall also make available information regarding interest
charged by LABs on microfinance loans.

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a board-approved policy regarding the conduct of employees and system for their recruitment, training and monitoring
controls.control_description:
An LAB shall have a Board-approved policy regarding the conduct of
employees and system for their recruitment, training and monitoring.

This policy

necessary training tools to deal with the customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, lay down minimum qualifications for the staff and shall provide necessary training tools to deal with the customers

controls.control_objective: To ensure include programs to inculcate appropriate behaviour towards customers
controls.control_description:
Training to employees shall
include programs to inculcate appropriate behaviour towards customers.

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be incorporated appropriately in their compensation matrix
controls.control_description:
Conduct of
employees towards customers shall also be incorporated appropriately in their
compensation matrix.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be incorporated appropriately in their compensation matrix

controls.control_objective: To ensure be trained to make necessary enquiries regarding the income and existing debt of the household
controls.control_description:
Field staff shall be trained to make necessary enquiries regarding the income
and existing debt of the household.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be trained to make necessary enquiries regarding the income and existing debt of the household

controls.control_objective: To ensure be free of cost
controls.control_description: Training, if any, offered to the borrowers shall be free of cost.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be free of cost

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a mechanism for identification of the borrowers facing repayment related difficulties, engagement with such borrowers and providing them
controls.control_description:
An LAB shall put in place a mechanism for identification of the borrowers facing
repayment related difficulties, engagement with such borrowers and providing them
necessary guidance about the recourse available.

controls.control_description:
Recovery shall be made at a designated / central designated place decided
mutually by the borrower and the LAB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made at a designated / central designated place decided mutually by the borrower and the lab

However, field staff shall be allowed to make
recovery at the place of residence or work of the borrower if the borrower fails to

controls.control_objective: To ensure engage in any harsh methods towards recovery

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to engage in any harsh methods towards recovery

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as harsh: (1) use of threatening or abusive language (2) persistently calling the borrower and / or calling the borrower before 9:00 a
controls.control_description:
Without limiting the general application of the foregoing, following practices shall be
deemed as harsh:
(1) Use of threatening or abusive language
(2) Persistently calling the borrower and / or calling the borrower before 9:00 a.m.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as harsh: (1) use of threatening or abusive language (2) persistently calling the borrower and / or calling the borrower before 9:00 a

controls.control_objective: To ensure to harm the borrower or borrower's family / assets / reputation (6) misleading the borrower about the extent of the debt or the consequences of non-re
controls.control_description:
(3) Harassing relatives, friends, or co-workers of the borrower
(4) Publishing the name of borrowers
(5) Use or threat of use of violence or other similar means to harm the borrower or
borrower's family / assets / reputation
(6) Misleading the borrower about the extent of the debt or the consequences of
non-repayment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to harm the borrower or borrower's family / assets / reputation (6) misleading the borrower about the extent of the debt or the consequences of non-re

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a dedicated mechanism for redressal of recovery related grievances
controls.control_description:
An LAB shall have a dedicated mechanism for redressal of recovery related
grievances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a dedicated mechanism for redressal of recovery related grievances

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided to the borrower at the time of loan disbursal
controls.control_description:
The details of this mechanism shall be provided to the borrower at the
time of loan disbursal.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided to the borrower at the time of loan disbursal

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean agencies engaged by an lab for recovery of dues from its borrowers and the employees of these agencies
controls.control_description:
Recovery agents shall mean agencies engaged by an LAB for recovery of dues
from its borrowers and the employees of these agencies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean agencies engaged by an lab for recovery of dues from its borrowers and the employees of these agencies

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a due diligence process in place for engagement of recovery agents, which shall, inter alia, cover individuals involved in the recovery process
controls.control_description:
An LAB shall have a due diligence process in place for engagement of recovery
agents, which shall, inter alia, cover individuals involved in the recovery process.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a due diligence process in place for engagement of recovery agents, which shall, inter alia, cover individuals involved in the recovery process

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the recovery agents engaged by it carry out verification of the antecedents of its employees, which shall include police verification
controls.control_description:
The
LAB shall ensure that the recovery agents engaged by it carry out verification of the
antecedents of its employees, which shall include police verification.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the recovery agents engaged by it carry out verification of the antecedents of its employees, which shall include police verification

controls.control_objective: To ensure also decide the periodicity at which re-verification of antecedents shall be resorted to
controls.control_description:
The LAB shall
also decide the periodicity at which re-verification of antecedents shall be resorted
to.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also decide the periodicity at which re-verification of antecedents shall be resorted to

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide the details of recovery agents to the borrower while initiating the process of recovery
controls.control_description:
To ensure due notice and appropriate authorisation, an LAB shall provide the
details of recovery agents to the borrower while initiating the process of recovery.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide the details of recovery agents to the borrower while initiating the process of recovery

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also carry a copy of the notice and the authorisation letter from the lab along with the identity card issued to him / her by the lab or the agency

controls.control_description:
Further, where the recovery agency is changed by the LAB during the recovery
process, in addition to the LAB notifying the borrower of the change, the new agent
shall carry the notice and the authorisation letter along with his / her identity card.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry the notice and the authorisation letter along with his / her identity card

controls.control_objective: To ensure , among other details, also include the contact details of the recovery agency and the lab

All transactions, including payment of interest on deposits / charging of interest
on advances, should be rounded off to the nearest rupee i.e., fractions of 50 paise
and above shall be rounded off to the next higher rupee and fraction of less than 50
paise shall be ignored.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be rounded off to the next higher rupee and fraction of less than 50 paise shall be ignored

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be rounded off in the same manner
controls.control_description:
Issue prices of cash certificates should also be rounded off in the same
manner.

controls.control_description:

controls.control_description:

and

controls.control_objective: To ensure settle the claim unless the concerned party produces an order/ decree from competent court or probate of the will (as may be applicable), till such ti
controls.control_description: In case the LAB receives multiple claims from legal heirs of the deceased or in cases where there are inter se disputes amongst the legal heirs or a third party produces Will of the deceased, the LAB shall not settle the claim unless the concerned party produces an Order/ Decree from Competent Court or Probate of the Will (as may be applicable), till such time the claim shall be kept on hold/ pending.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to settle the claim unless the concerned party produces an order/ decree from competent court or probate of the will (as may be applicable), till such ti

Name of the originating RE, along with its funding proportion
